2391720.name: Last Holiday Soundtrack
2391720.description:
Every game needs an upbeat soundtrack that can make any chick dance on the hole. Last Holiday's soundtrack is no different, and it can get any ice queen out of her chair. By purchasing the soundtrack, you're also directly supporting the developer and the game itself, which will come in handy for Boomers.

We guess everyone had a favorite song in their youth that, when it was played by DJ, made them fly out of the bar faster than a formula racer. Enjoy the feeling we get with this soundtrack.
